title: FuelCell Energy (FCEL) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: FuelCell Energy stock analysis and forecast data from StockAnalysis. Analyst consensus shows Hold rating with divergent price targets. Revenue projections show FY2024 revenue decline of 9% to $112.1M (actual: $112.1M). FY2025 revenue projected at approximately $150-180M range based on backlog conversion rates. Earnings projections remain deeply negative with continued net losses expected through 2024-2025 due to gross margin pressures and fixed cost structure. Company's path to profitability depends on: (1) successful conversion of $1.16B backlog into revenue, (2) achieving positive gross margins on product and service revenue, (3) cost reduction from restructuring plan. Key metrics tracked include backlog conversion rate, gross margin improvement, operating expense trends. Forecast notes significant upside risk if AI data center power market materializes as expected, but downside risk if execution delays or market adoption slower than anticipated. Stock forecast models incorporate probability-weighted scenarios for base case (hold), bull case (data center market materializes), and bear case (execution delays, slower adoption).
